negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Missing payload-build heartbeat expiry check that calls get_expired_agents under a read-only tracker snapshot without sync_from_storage or mutable hydration.
related_but_insufficient_code: The port has heartbeat revival synthesis from parent state, but no payload-builder read-lock get_expired_agents path was found.

notes: Confirmed gap; heartbeat revival synthesis is related but not the same tracker expiry path.
rationale: The bounded candidate explicitly removes mutable storage hydration from the heartbeat expiry read-lock path while preserving get_expired_agents. No later bounded candidate changes that path.
statement: During payload building, heartbeat expiry checks run as a read-only tracker snapshot operation: the read-locked path calls get_expired_agents without sync_from_storage or other mutable hydration.
suggested_falsification_tests: Instrument HeartbeatTracker so sync_from_storage records calls or panics, run payload building through heartbeat expiry, and assert get_expired_agents executes without any sync_from_storage call under the read lock.
summary: Heartbeat expiry read-only payload-build checks are absent.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Instrument HeartbeatTracker::sync_from_storage and run payload building through heartbeat expiry; current port has no such payload path to exercise.
title: Heartbeat expiry checks are read-only during payload builds
